assertions.title: MLA forward pass shape — Output shape (batch, seq_len, d_model) given input of same shape

steps.action: Run test_forward_shape_full_layer: F-layer forward with batch=2, seq_len=16, d_model=256
Run test_forward_shape_shared_layer: S-layer forward with batch=2, seq_len=16, d_model=256
Run test_forward_shape_various_batch_sizes: F-layer forward with batch in [1,4,8] and seq_len in [8,32]
steps.expected: output.shape == (batch, seq_len, d_model) for all combinations

evidence.testResults: test_forward_shape_full_layer PASSED, test_forward_shape_shared_layer PASSED, test_forward_shape_various_batch_sizes PASSED

assertions.title: IndexCache F-layer computes indices — F layer returns indices tensor, non-empty, dtype torch.int64

steps.action: Run test_f_layer_computes_indices: F-layer forward, check indices is not None, dtype torch.int64, numel > 0
steps.observed: PASSED — indices is not None, dtype torch.int64, numel > 0

steps.action: Run test_f_layer_indexer_called_flag: F-layer forward, check _indexer_called == True
Run test_f_layer_has_indexer: F-layer has SparseIndexer instance
steps.expected: indexer is not None and isinstance SparseIndexer

steps.action: Run SparseIndexer tests: test_output_dtype, test_output_non_empty, test_indices_in_valid_range
steps.observed: PASSED — all SparseIndexer unit tests passed

evidence.testResults: test_f_layer_computes_indices PASSED, test_f_layer_indexer_called_flag PASSED, test_f_layer_has_indexer PASSED, test_output_dtype PASSED, test_output_non_empty PASSED, test_indices_in_valid_range PASSED

assertions.title: IndexCache S-layer reuses indices — S-layer receives pre-computed indices, uses them without calling its own indexer

steps.action: Run test_s_layer_no_indexer: S-layer should not have SparseIndexer
Run test_s_layer_indexer_not_called: S-layer forward should not set _indexer_called
Run test_s_layer_with_provided_indices: S-layer uses F-layer indices, output is valid shape
steps.expected: output.shape == (batch, seq_len, d_model), returned_indices is None
steps.observed: PASSED — correct output shape, returned_indices is None

steps.action: Run test_s_layer_output_non_trivial: S-layer with indices produces non-zero output

evidence.testResults: test_s_layer_no_indexer PASSED, test_s_layer_indexer_not_called PASSED, test_s_layer_with_provided_indices PASSED, test_s_layer_output_non_trivial PASSED, test_s_layer_without_indices_uses_full_attention PASSED

assertions.title: IndexCache layer pattern string — Model accepts binary pattern string, pattern length equals num_layers, invalid patterns raise ValueError

steps.action: Run test_valid_pattern: valid patterns 'F', 'FSFF', 'FSFFS', 'FSSSFS', 'FFFFFF', 'SSSSS' accepted
Run test_invalid_length_raises: patterns with wrong length raise ValueError
steps.observed: PASSED — ValueError raised for length mismatch

steps.action: Run test_invalid_characters_raise: patterns with invalid chars (X, A, B) raise ValueError
steps.observed: PASSED — ValueError raised for invalid characters

steps.action: Run test_construction_valid_pattern: IndexCacheManager('FSFFS', 5) constructs without error
Run test_construction_invalid_pattern_raises: IndexCacheManager('FXX', 3) raises ValueError
Run test_pattern_string_various_lengths: valid and invalid patterns for num_layers 1-7
steps.expected: Valid patterns construct; invalid raise ValueError
steps.observed: PASSED — all 7 valid + 7 invalid patterns handled correctly

evidence.testResults: test_valid_pattern PASSED, test_invalid_length_raises PASSED, test_invalid_characters_raise PASSED, test_construction_valid_pattern PASSED, test_construction_invalid_pattern_raises PASSED, test_pattern_string_various_lengths PASSED, test_empty_pattern_valid_for_zero_layers PASSED, test_non_empty_pattern_for_zero_layers_raises PASSED

assertions.title: IndexCache multi-layer distillation loss — Loss is scalar, requires_grad=True, dim==0

steps.action: Run test_loss_is_scalar: compute_distillation_loss returns 0-dim tensor
Run test_loss_requires_grad: loss.requires_grad is True
Run test_loss_backward: loss.backward() succeeds, gradients flow
steps.observed: PASSED — backward pass works, gradients non-zero

steps.action: Run test_loss_non_negative: KL divergence loss >= 0
Run test_loss_multiple_s_layers: distillation works with 3 S-layers
Run test_loss_zero_when_distributions_match: identical distributions give near-zero loss
steps.observed: PASSED — loss approaches zero for matching distributions

evidence.testResults: test_loss_is_scalar PASSED, test_loss_requires_grad PASSED, test_loss_backward PASSED, test_loss_non_negative PASSED, test_loss_multiple_s_layers PASSED, test_loss_zero_when_distributions_match PASSED, test_loss_empty_s_layers_raises PASSED

summary: Tested 5 assertions (VAL-ARCH-005 through VAL-ARCH-009): all 5 passed. All 58 tests in test_mla.py and test_indexcache.py passed in 1.36s on CPU.
